message:
fix(triage): exclude in_progress beads from robot-next recommendations

--robot-next was recommending beads already in_progress, which defeats
the purpose of picking the next item to work on. Filter them out of the
triage recommendation loop so only truly available beads are suggested.

Fixes #168

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
